Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 105 

HRR_ADJSTMT_PCT 

LABEL: Hospital Readmission Reduction (HRR) Adjustment Percent 

DESCRIPTION: The percent used to identify the readmission adjustment factor that will be applied in determining the 
payment amount for the Hospital Readmission Reduction (HRR) Program. 

SHORT NAME: HRR_ADJSTMT_PCT 

LONG NAME: HRR_ADJSTMT_PCT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: X.XXXXX 

COMMENT:
